nasb.text: Now therefore, gather the rest of the people together and camp against the city and capture it, or I will capture the city myself and it will be named after me.”

esv.text: Now then gather the rest of the people together and encamp against the city and take it, lest I take the city and it be called by my name.”

cnv.text: 現在，請你聚集其餘的人民，安營攻打這城，把城攻取；免得我攻取了這城，人就以我的名字來叫這城。”

ccb.text: 请你赶快带领其余的兵马前来围攻并占领这城，免得我攻取这城以后，人们用我的名字为这城命名。”
